creator: bryan@shatow.net
text:
'make config' leaves behind orphaned tmp files due to running `mktemp` twice and not removing the old temp file. Also fixes case of exitting without cleaning up.

How-To-Repeat: 	rm -f /tmp/portoptions.* /var/db/ports/portupgrade/options
	make -C /usr/ports/ports-mgmt/portupgrade config
	ls -al /tmp/portoptions*
